title: Simple Chat clear
description: A simple chat clear plugin that allows you to delete the entire chat
body:
A simple Chat Clear plugin which does not delete the chat can be used with perms

## ✨ Features
- There is a bypass permission
- Everyone can no longer see the chat if it has been deleted unless you have the bypass permission
- Every clear produces a great sound
- You can edit all messages and more in the config

## Commands and Permissions

- ```/cc``` | chatclear.use | Allows clearing the chat
- chatclear.bypass | Chat will not be cleared for this player


## 🧩 Compatibility

| Server Type            | Supported            |
|---------------------|:---------------------:
| Paper            | ✅              | 
| Spigot            | ✅              | 
| Bukkit            | ✅              | 
| Bungeecord | ❌ | 
| Velocity | ❌ | 


<details>
<summary>Config</summary>


```
# ChatClear Configuration File
# Use & for color codes (e.g., &a for green, &c for red)

# Number of empty lines to send
clear-lines: 100

# Messages
messages:
  no-permission: "&cYou don't have permission to do that!"
  chat-cleared: "&7═══════════════════════════════\n&aThe chat has been cleared!\n&7═══════════════════════════════"
  bypass-notification: "&eThe chat has been cleared!"
  broadcast: "&7The chat has been cleared by &e%player%&7!"
```


</details>
